name: WFBE_NEURODEF_LIGHT_WALLS_V4
notes: LIGHT FACTORY WALLS V4 (flag WFBE_C_WALLS_V4, default 0; V3 stays live default). FULL array: exact legacy 10x Land_HBarrier_large U-ring (verbatim) + redesigned Concrete_Wall_EP1 slab layer OUTSIDE the ring at the HQ 2.2 m overlap pitch. HARD CONSTRAINT (Init_Defenses.sqf design contract): the +X (model-right) face stays FULLY OPEN - Client_BuildUnit.sqf spawns vehicles toward +X; no slab has x>7.6 and none sits on the +X plane. Legacy infantry walking gaps preserved: the -X wall gap (y between -4.5 and 1.5) is matched by a slab-layer gap (lower pair ends y=-4.8, upper run starts y=1.5); the front/rear center gaps (|x|<2.5) stay open between the slab pairs (inner edge x=3.6). No lone single panels: every slab is part of a contiguous pair/run. Land_CncBlock_Stripes accents at the three gap mouths. Offsets mirrored front/rear.

objs.role: LEGACY - +X face south (egress side, kept as-is)
V4 slab - -X lower pair (south of walking gap)
V4 slab - -X upper run (north of walking gap)
V4 slab - front-left pair inner (gap edge x=-3.6)
V4 slab - front-right pair inner (gap edge x=3.6)
V4 accent - front gap mouth left
V4 accent - front gap mouth right
